items.name: Classic Burger
items.description: Juicy grilled beef patty with lettuce, tomato, and cheese.

items.name: BBQ Bacon Burger
items.description: Smoky BBQ sauce, crispy bacon, and melted cheddar.

items.name: Spicy Jalapeno Burger
items.description: Hot jalapenos, spicy sauce, and pepper jack cheese.

items.name: Pepperoni Pizza
items.description: Classic pizza topped with pepperoni and mozzarella.

items.name: Margherita Pizza
items.description: Fresh tomatoes, basil, and mozzarella cheese.

items.name: Veggie Delight
items.description: Loaded with fresh vegetables and herbs.

items.name: Chocolate Lava Cake
items.description: Warm chocolate cake with a gooey molten center.

items.name: Vanilla Ice Cream
items.description: Classic creamy vanilla ice cream scoop.

items.name: Strawberry Donut
items.description: Soft donut topped with strawberry glaze.

reviews.comment: Absolutely delicious, one of the best burgers I've had!
Great taste and fresh ingredients, will order again.
Desserts were amazing, especially the lava cake!
